metadata.title: Rayanne B. Lima — Full Stack Engineer
metadata.description: Senior Full Stack Engineer specializing in frontend architecture, design systems and performance-driven engineering for startups and growing companies.
metadata.keywords: Full Stack Engineer, frontend architect, design systems, performance engineering, vue.js, next.js, typescript, rayanne bertolace lima

hero.headline: Engineering with product vision. Code with purpose.
hero.sub: Frontend architecture, design systems and performance-driven engineering for startups and growing companies.

positioning.headline: Code solves problems. Engineering builds businesses.
positioning.caption: Code is only half of the delivery.

architecture.title: Frontend Architecture
architecture.description: Scalable structures built for long-term evolution. Vue.js, Next.js and TypeScript with patterns that sustain growth without breaking.

designSystems.title: Design Systems
designSystems.description: Component libraries that align product and engineering. Consistency, speed and a shared language between design and code.

performance.title: Performance Engineering
performance.description: Optimized experiences with measurable impact. Every millisecond of LCP is a conscious decision guided by real data.

product.title: Product Thinking
product.description: Technical decisions guided by business strategy. I think about the user and the market before writing the first line of code.

aiEngineering.title: AI-Augmented Engineering
aiEngineering.description: Spec-driven development, structured prompts and human review at every step. AI accelerates delivery without creating tech debt — because speed without control is just rework in disguise.

deskbee.name: Deskbee
deskbee.challenge: Joined as a frontend developer and progressively took ownership of the entire stack. From core product modules to Room Display for legacy hardware, from framework migration and processes to an AI-built landing page — each delivery expanded my scope and impact within the company.
deskbee.technologies: Vue.js, Quasar, Shadcn, Storybook, Typescript, Laravel, Docker, SonarQube, React, Next.js, Clarity

sosuba.name: SOS Ubá
sosuba.challenge: Centralizing essential information after the February 24, 2026 flood in Ubá-MG. Interactive map with collection points, shelters, vaccination sites, areas needing cleanup, businesses offering solidarity meals and much more.
sosuba.technologies: Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Supabase, Cloudflare Workers, Tailwind CSS, Clarity, GA4

pulsatrix.name: Pulsatrix Apps
pulsatrix.challenge: Delivering enterprise-quality digital solutions for clients who need results without the overhead of traditional agencies.

tray.name: Tray
tray.challenge: High-scale platform needing continuous frontend evolution to support thousands of merchants daily.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Understand the problem, market and real opportunity before any technical decision.

architect.title: Architect
architect.description: Define structure, priorities and technical direction. Every choice is a product decision.

build.title: Build
build.description: Implement with focus on quality, predictability and performance. Speed without shortcuts.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: Data-driven monitoring and continuous improvement. Shipping is just the beginning.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Prepare systems for growth. Components, tokens, pipelines and tests that sustain evolution.

womenInTech.title: Women in Tech: Building careers, projects and digital businesses
womenInTech.event: Break the Pattern — IFSEMG Rio Pomba
womenInTech.description: My journey in tech, both as a Full Stack developer and founder of Pulsatrix Apps. With over 6 years in the field, I discuss the importance of academic extension and research projects, freelancing, social impact projects and how Pulsatrix Apps was born.

finalCta.sub1: I don't deliver code on demand.
finalCta.sub2: I deliver solutions with context, ownership, and results.

footer.bio: Engineer, entrepreneur, problem solver. I build complete digital solutions — with the urgency of someone who's been on both sides.
footer.rights: Rayanne Bertolace Lima. All rights reserved.
